component.name: Gridge
component.summary: Add streaming sites and cloud gaming services as Steam shortcuts

description.p: Gridge lets you type a URL or a known streaming/cloud-gaming service name, finds matching artwork on SteamGridDB, and creates a non-Steam shortcut so it shows up as a native-looking tile in Steam's Game Mode -- built for Steam hardware in mind.

ul.li: Add a YouTube "Leanback mode" toggle for the TV-style interface
Add music streaming services (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Tidal, Deezer, SoundCloud, Pandora, iHeartRadio, Qobuz, Bandcamp)
Add a dedicated SteamGridDB search field, independent of the URL bar
Include SteamGridDB's Humor-tagged artwork, and remove the fixed limit that silently dropped results for popular titles
Fix onboarding never detecting a freshly-installed Steam, and have Gridge launch and explain first-time Steam setup
Fix several artwork picker layout bugs on large windows and when a category's results overflow
Add a reminder to set a Steam Input controller layout per shortcut, as couldn't find a way to set it automatically
Add an MIT license, disclaimer, and project credits
